LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ZAKARIAH LAFRENIERE, MOTION TO VACATE COURT ORDER OF 4/23/10 ERRANTLY DENYING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS "MOOT" AND FOR REINSTATEMENT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. ON SEPTEMBER 18, 2009 THE COURT SUSTAINED DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR THE REASONS SET FORTH IN THE OCTOBER 13, 2009 ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AND DISMISSING THE MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. NO AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS OR COULD BE FILED AND SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS FILED IN A DISMISSED CASE. NO GOOD CAUSE DEMONSTRATED TO VACATE THE 4/23/2010 ORDER OR TO REINSTATE THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. CASE WAS DISMISSED MORE THAN SIX MONTHS AGO. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEE OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. NO LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE ORIGINAL SOURCE OF THE PURPORTED FALSE CLAIMS [GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 12652(D)(3)(A)]. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE A CLAIM BECAUSE THERE IS NO SHOWING OF A FALSE CLAIM BY THE BOARD, OR ONE THAT THE STATE WAS NOT AWARE; THE BOARD IS NOT A PROPER DEFENDANT; AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE PROCEDURAL REQUIREMENTS OF THE FALSE CLAIMS ACT. (GOVERNMENT CODE SECTIONS 12650 - 12652.) NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECTS CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion To Vacate Court Order Of 4/23/10 Errantly Denying Motion For Summary Judgment As "Moot" And For Reinstatement Of Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ZAKARIAH LAFRENIERE, Motion to Vacate Court Order Of 4/23/10 Errantly Denying Motion for Summary Judgment as "Moot" and for Reinstatement of Motion for Summary Judgment. Appearances: Plaintiff Zakariah LaFreniere appearing in Pro Per and moving party; Beverley Meyers, Deputy Attorney General, (415) 703-5545 appearing for Defendant and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. On September 18, 2009 the Court sustained defendant's unopposed demurrer with leave to amend for the reasons set forth in the October 13, 2009 order sustaining Demurrer without leave to amend and dismissing the matter with prejudice. No amended complaint was or could be filed and summary judgment was filed in a dismissed case. No good cause demonstrated to vacate the 4/23/2010 order or to reinstate the motion for summary judgment. Case was dismissed more than six months ago. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion To Vacate Court Order Of 4/23/10 Errantly Denying Motion For Summary Judgment As "Moot" And For Reinstatement Of Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Continued To Jun-18-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Motion is continued to 6/18/2010. Appearances: Zakariah LaFreniere Pro Per Plaintiff appearing and moving party. (Plaintiff arrived late, and the matter was recalled at 10:27 a.m.) The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Moving party to provide courtesy copy of papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ZAKARIAH LAFRENIERE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Zakariah LaFreniere, Plaintiff appearing in Pro Per and Moving party. Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, as moot. On 10/13/09 the court dismissed this action. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR# 9581

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEE OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained, no opposition filed. No leave to amend. The Court lacks jurisdiction because plaintiff is not the original source of the purported false claims [Government Code section 12652(d)(3)(A)]. Plaintiff fails to state a claim because there is no showing of a false claim by the Board, or one that the state was not aware; the Board is not a proper defendant; and plaintiff failed to comply with the procedural requirements of the False Claims Act. (Government Code sections 12650 - 12652.) No reasonable probability that defects can be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Denied
